events.title: Cayucos Friday Farmers' Market
events.venue: Corner of D Street & Ocean Avenue, Downtown Cayucos
events.summary: Outdoor summer market with local produce, flowers & seasonal fish. Runs Fridays 10am–12:30pm from early June through Labor Day weekend.

events.title: Brian Waterbury Memorial Rock to Pier Fun Run & Rock'n Around the Pier Half Marathon
events.venue: Starts at Morro Rock; finishes at Cayucos Pier
events.summary: 56th annual beach run along hard-packed sand from Morro Rock to Cayucos Pier (6 mi) plus a half-marathon option. All ages welcome.

events.title: Cayucos Fall Antique Street Faire
events.venue: N. Ocean Avenue (Cayucos Drive to E Street), Downtown Cayucos
events.summary: 40th edition of this twice-yearly outdoor faire with 100+ dealers selling antiques, vintage & collectibles. Free admission, rain or shine.

events.title: 35th Annual Cayucos Car Show
events.summary: Classic cars fill downtown Cayucos for this all-day rain-or-shine show with a live band, beer garden & Lions Club BBQ. Pre-registration required.
